rows.label: xs00110100_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ideally, we would have chosen
a safer area to land, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00110100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Out in space, you find friendly races,
but you also find creatures that aren't.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00110100_MSG0003
rows.name:
There's no need to be needlessly aggressive, but in the
end, you're the only one who can protect yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00110100_MSG0006
rows.name:
You'll fit right in with the
people living here, I'm sure.[ST:wait ]
